findings.description: The knowledge file adds a semicolon to `terminate(result, ctx);` that is not present in the source. The source code reads `terminate(result, ctx)` (no semicolon) in the finally block.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `terminate(result, ctx)                   // バッチが終了した後、一度だけ呼ばれる。` — no trailing semicolon.
